message:
perf(http1): use memchr for colon search in header line parsing

Replace scalar byte-by-byte colon search loop in parse_header_line_bounds
with memchr(b':', line_bytes) for SIMD-accelerated delimiter finding.
Header name validation is now a separate pass over the (typically short)
name bytes. All 40 h1::codec tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
